query_normalized: predicting the impact of alloying on high-temperature oxidation resistance materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b): it measures the same physical mechanism (high-temperature oxidation resistance via oxide scale formation and evolution) and measures the dependent variable (oxidation kinetics, protective scale behavior) on the same domain (superalloys/alloys).
